summary: All 10 Flowtym features tested and verified. Login, Flowboard KPIs, Housekeeping Stats/Realtime/Rooms, NotificationBell, and PMS iframe with Planning/Reservations tabs all working correctly. Previous 'Invalid Date' bug in Timeline appears FIXED.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Login Supabase (admin@flowtym.com / admin123) → Successful redirect to /flowboard
TEST 2: Flowboard KPIs display correctly - Occupation 27%, Arrivées 1, Départs 1, En séjour 3 clients, Chambres libres 8/11, Ménage fait 2/11
TEST 3: Housekeeping Stats display correctly - 11 Chambres, 3 Départs, 8 Recouches, 1 En cours, 2 Terminées, 73% Propreté
TEST 4: Housekeeping Realtime badge 'Connecté en temps réel' visible in green with 'V2 Temps réel' indicator
TEST 5: Housekeeping rooms table displays 11 rooms (101-304) with statuses from Supabase
TEST 6: NotificationBell icon visible in top navigation (data-testid='notification-bell')
TEST 7: NotificationBell panel opens on click (data-testid='notification-panel')
TEST 8: PMS iframe loads correctly at /pms with Supabase Bridge (5 rooms, 8 reservations)
TEST 9: PMS Planning tab accessible - shows weekly grid with rooms Ch.101-202, Dispo/TO% stats
TEST 10: PMS Reservations tab accessible - shows 8 reservations with client details (Sophie Dubois, Ali Larabi, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: E-reputation scores remain MOCKED (hardcoded at 4.2/5) in Flowboard.jsx line 482
Timeline 'Invalid Date' bug from iteration_47 appears FIXED - now shows proper times (11:00, 15:00)
seed_data_creation: None required - using existing Supabase data (11 rooms, 8 reservations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features verified working. Supabase integration fully functional. PMS iframe uses Supabase Bridge to load data. Housekeeping uses V2 API with Supabase Realtime (postgres_changes). NotificationBell component integrated in TopNavigation. E-reputation scores still mocked.

mocked_apis.E-reputation: global_score hardcoded at 4.2/5 with platforms Google: 4.3, Booking: 4.1, TripAdvisor: 4.2
